question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/middleware/trace.go -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getClientIpAddress()] Can an unprivileged external user set a spoofed X-Real-IP header value to impersonate a trusted IP address, bypassing any IP-based rate limiting or access controls on the /construction/metadata fee endpoint, causing the server to return manipulated SuggestedFee values without throttling?
